value.text: Oh {player}, Prof. Oak was looking for you!
Oh! You should rest!

OAK: Hey!
Don't go away yet!

properties.name: text
properties.value: I study POK{e}MON as PRO. OAK's AIDE.

properties.name: text
properties.value: I study POK{e}MON as PRO. OAK's AIDE.

properties.name: text
properties.value: I study POK{e}MON as PRO. OAK's AIDE.

value.text:
{rival}: Wait, {player}!
Let's check out our POK{e}MON!
Come on, I'll take you on!

{rival}: Okay! I'll make my
POK{e}MON battle to toughen it up!
{player}! Gramps!
Smell you later!
Healing!

As proof of your victory,
here's the BOULDERBADGE!

{player} received the
BOULDERBADGE from BROCK!
You should take this, too!

{player} received TM39
from BROCK!

That TM contains ROCK TOMB.
A POK{e}MON hit by this move
will have its Speed reduced.

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I'm BROCK! I'm PEWTER's GYM
Leader!
I believe in rock hard
defense and determination!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
There are all sorts of
Trainers in this world.
Good luck on your journey!

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
Dang! Light years isn't
time! It measures distance!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Stop right there!
You're still light years away
from facing BROCK!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
BROCK is really something!
I'd quit while you can!

value.text:
Wow! You're too much!
All right!
You can have the CASCADEBADGE
to show that you beat me!

{player} received the
CASCADEBADGE from MISTY!

{player} received TM03
from MISTY!

That TM contains WATER PULSE!
It can also confuse the foe.

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
My policy is an all-out
offensive with Water-type
POK{e}MON!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
You can do even better.
I know you can!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
What? you?
I'm more than good enough for you!
MISTY won't have to be bothered.

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
You have to face other TRAINERS
to see how good you really are.

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Splash!
I'm first up!
Let's do it!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
MISTY is a TRAINER who's going to
keep improving.
She won't lose to someone like you!

value.text:
Whoa! You're the real deal,
kid!
Fine then, take the
THUNDERBADGE!

{player} received the
THUNDERBADGE from LT. SURGE!

{player} received TM34
from LT. SURGE!

TM34 contains SHOCK WAVE!
It can't be evaded!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Hey, kid! What do you think
you're doing here?
You won't live long in
combat! Not with your
weak POK{e}MON!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Kid, you've got guts.
With your talent, you could
become a Pokemon master!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Ahoy! I'm a rough and
tough SAILOR man!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
LT. SURGE saved my life
once. I owe him everything!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I've built a POK{e}MON
that's bursting with power!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
LT. SURGE is a master of
Electric POK{e}MON!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
You are a Pokemon Trainer?
I'm impressed!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
LT. SURGE was a pilot.
Electric POK{e}MON saved
him during the war!

value.text:
Oh! I concede defeat.
You are remarkably strong.
I must confer on you the
RAINBOWBADGE.

{player} received the
RAINBOWBADGE from ERIKA!

{player} received TM19
from ERIKA!

TM19 contains GIGA DRAIN.
Half the damage it inflicts
is restored as HP to the user.

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Hello... Lovely weather,
isn't it? It's so pleasant.
...Oh dear... I must have
dozed off. Welcome.
My name is ERIKA.

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Oh, your POK{e}MON are
so delightful!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I love Grass-type
POK{e}MON! They're cute!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Oh? You want to challenge
ERIKA?

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
I heard ERIKA's POK{e}MON
are really strong!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I'll show you the power
of my Grass POK{e}MON!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value: This GYM is full of women!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I raise POK{e}MON here
with ERIKA! You can't win!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Flowers are Pokemon
of the garden!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
My sweet scented POK{e}MON
will put you to sleep!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Grass-type POK{e}MON are
so fragrant and lovely!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
I want to smell the flowers
with my POK{e}MON!

value.text:
Humph! You have proven
your worth!
Here! Take the SOULBADGE!

{player} received the
SOULBADGE from KOGA!

{player} received TM06
from KOGA!

TM06 contains TOXIC!
It inflicts a progressively
worsening poison on the foe.

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
Hm! You have proven
your worth!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Fwahahaha!
A mere child like you dares
to challenge me?
Very well, I shall show you
true terror as a ninja master!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
POK{e}MON is not merely
about brute force. You can
tame even the most powerful
with superior technique!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
You must have a death wish
to challenge us ninjas!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Our ninja master is quite
accomplished!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I will demonstrate the
ninja art of confusion!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
KOGA uses clever traps!
Don't be fooled!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Do you want to see my
fearsome trained POK{e}MON?

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Poison-type POK{e}MON are
tricky to deal with!

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
Wha? But I'm KOGA's
best student!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I'm KOGA's best student!
Prepare yourself!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
KOGA has trained us
well in the way of the
ninja!

value.text:
Your power... It far exceeds
what I foresaw...
Here. Take the MARSHBADGE.

{player} received the
MARSHBADGE from SABRINA!

{player} received TM04
from SABRINA!

TM04 contains CALM MIND.
It raises Sp.Atk and Sp.Def.

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
Your power... It far
exceeds what I foresaw...

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I had a vision of your
arrival!
I have had psychic powers
since I was a child.
I foresaw that you would come.

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
I had psychic powers
since I was a little girl...
I always knew what other
people were thinking...

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Heheh! I can see your
future in my crystal ball!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
The spirits tell me you
will lose!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
SABRINA sees into the
future. You have no hope.

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
I didn't see that one
coming...

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I can predict your every
move!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
SABRINA's psychic power
lets her communicate
with POK{e}MON!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I see your doom in
my crystal ball!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
You have potential.
I can sense it.

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
Impossible! I read the
wrong thoughts!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I knew you were coming!
I can read your thoughts!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
SABRINA is the most
powerful psychic I know!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Ke...ke...ke...ke...
Do you believe in ghosts?

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
You'll never find your way
through this GYM!

value.text:
I have burnt out!
You have earned the
VOLCANOBADGE!

{player} received the
VOLCANOBADGE from BLAINE!

{player} received TM38
from BLAINE!

TM38 contains FIRE BLAST!
It's powerful but inaccurate.

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Hah! I am BLAINE, the
red-hot Leader of
CINNABAR GYM!
My fiery POK{e}MON are
going to incinerate you!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Hah! The VOLCANOBADGE makes
all POK{e}MON up to Lv.70
obey you!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I'm the fire quiz master!
Answer wrong and you fight!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Who knows the answers
better than a BURGLAR?

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
My knowledge of fire-types
is encyclopedic!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Answer correctly and
you can skip this fight!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
BLAINE's POK{e}MON are
on fire! Be careful!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Don't you think fire is
beautiful and powerful?

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Are you smart enough
to avoid battling me?

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
If you can beat the quiz,
you don't have to fight!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
My fire POK{e}MON will
show you no mercy!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
BLAINE is the hottest
Leader in all of KANTO!

value.text:
Ha! That was a truly
fine battle!
You have earned the
EARTHBADGE!

{player} received the
EARTHBADGE from GIOVANNI!

{player} received TM26
from GIOVANNI!

TM26 contains EARTHQUAKE!
It strikes every POK{e}MON
around the user in battle.

properties.name: text-defeated
properties.value:
Ha! That was a truly
fine battle!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Fwahahahaha! This is my GYM!
You dare to challenge me?
I'll show you the true power
of Ground-type POK{e}MON!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Having lost, I cannot face
my followers...
I will go solo training
to become stronger...

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Ha! This GYM is great!
It's full of strong Trainers!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
The Leader is the
strongest of us all!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
You'll feel the sting
of my iron fist!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
The Leader is like a wall
that cannot be scaled!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Do you want to see my
trained POK{e}MON?

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
The Leader's Ground-type
POK{e}MON are amazing!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
Our Leader is the mightiest
Trainer of all!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Our Leader is truly
the strongest!

properties.name: text-intro
properties.value:
I'm going to prove
how strong I am!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
You're good enough to
take on our Leader!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
Our Leader uses
Ground-type POK{e}MON
with great skill!

properties.name: text-post-defeat
properties.value:
The arrows on the floor
are our GYM's trademark!

value.text:
GARY: What, it's only {player}?
Gramps isn't around.

One of Prof.Oak's POK{e} BALLS.
I wonder what's inside!

One of Prof.Oak's POK{e} BALLS.
I wonder what's inside!

One of Prof.Oak's POK{e} BALLS.
I wonder what's inside!

{rival}: Heh, I do't need to be greedy like you. I'm mature!
Go ahead and choose, {player}!

OAK: Now, {player}!
Inside those three POK{e} BALLS are POK{e}MON.
Which one will you choose for yourself?
Will you choose {starter:1}?
{rival}: I'll take this one, then!
Will you choose {starter:2}?
{rival}: I'll take this one, then!
Will you choose {starter:3}?
{rival}: I'll take this one, then!

OAK: Oh, {player}!
How is my old POK{e}MON?
Well, it seems to like you a lot.
You must be talented as a POK{e}MON trainer!

What? You have something for me?
...OAK received the parcel!

OAK: Ah! This is the custom
POK{e} BALL I ordered!
Thank you!
{rival}: Gramps!

OAK: Oh right! I have a request
for you two.

On the desk there is my invention,
POK{e}DEX!
It automatically records data on
POK{e}MON you've seen or caught!
It's a hi-tech encyclopedia!

OAK: {player} and {rival}! Take
these with you!

{player} received a POK{e}DEX
from PROF. OAK!

OAK: To make a complete guide on
all the POK{e}MON in the world...
That was my dream!
But, I'm too old!
I can't do it!
So, I want you two to fulfill my
dream for me!
OAK: Here, take these, too!

{player} received 5 POK{e} BALLS
from PROF. OAK!

{rival}: Alright, Gramps!
Leave it all to me!
{player}, I hate to say it, but I
don't need you to get a complete
POK{e}DEX! I'll get it on my own!
Smell ya later!
OAK: Good luck to you, {player}!

OAK: How is your POK{e}DEX
coming along?
Here, let me see.
...

OAK: Good, good! Keep it up
and try to catch them all!

Hey!
You came from PALLET TOWN?

You know PROF. OAK right?
His order came in.
Can I get you to take it to him?

{player} received OAK's Parcel
from the POKéMON MART clerk.

Okay, thanks! Please say hi to
PROF. OAK for me, too.
Nothing here! Try another bin.
You found the first switch! There's a second switch somewhere...
Nothing here! Oh no, the switches reset.
You found the second switch! The door is now unlocked!
The door is already unlocked.
